rawEffect: On Shards generated, deal damage to all enemies equal to 10% of their Max HP (Minimum: 2500 damage).

name: Shard Precision Prism
rawEffect: Heroes gain Crit equal to the number of Shards in bank (Max: 1000).

name: Shard Resonator
rawEffect: On Shards generated, Heroes gain 1000 Shields.

name: Shard Vessel
rawEffect: Quest: Generate 15 Shards. Reward: Heroes gain 20 Crit and 5 Omnivamp.

name: Shelter Mandate
rawEffect: Quest: Apply 30000 Shields. Reward: Increase your team size by 1 (Max: 5).

name: Shield Accumulator
rawEffect: Quest: Apply 1250 Shields. Reward: Gain 15 Shards.

name: Shield Ascendancy
rawEffect: Quest: Apply 15000 Shields. Reward: Heroes gain +50% Defense and +50% Crit while Shielded.
reward: Heroes gain +50% Defense and +50% Crit while Shielded.

name: Shield Bastion
rawEffect: After Stall (15), Heroes gain a lasting 33% Max HP Shield.

name: Shield Bauble
rawEffect: At start of combat, heroes gain 250 lasting Shields.

name: Shield Conduit
rawEffect: Quest: Apply 7500 Shields. Reward: Heroes gain 100 Attack and 100 Magic while Shielded.
reward: Heroes gain 100 Attack and 100 Magic while Shielded.

name: Shield Converter
rawEffect: Whenever a Hero gains Shields from any source but itself, damage the nearest enemy to them for 33% of the Shield applied.

name: Shield Fluctuator
rawEffect: Heroes gain 15 Crit and 4 Mana Regen while Shielded.

name: Shield Fragmentation Engine
rawEffect: Whenever an enemy damages a Hero's Shields, deal 200% of the damage back to the source.

name: Shield Generator
rawEffect: At start of combat, Heroes gain 400 lasting Shields.

name: Shield Investment Filigree
rawEffect: At start of combat and after Stall (20), spend 1 Shard to apply lasting Shields to all Heroes, then permanently increase the amount of Shields this applies by 50.

name: Shield Repriser
rawEffect: Whenever an enemy damages a Hero's Shields, deal 75% of the damage back to the source.

name: Shield Vessel
rawEffect: Quest: Apply 2500 Shields. Reward: Heroes gain 30 Magic and 30 Attack.

name: Slaughter Mandate
rawEffect: Quest: Deal 15000 damage with auto attacks. Reward: Increase your team size by 1 (Max: 5).

name: Stability System Starting
rawEffect: Emergency Rewind starts with 30 more Shards.

name: Stalwart Differentiator
rawEffect: Heroes gain 3 Defense for each time you've rerolled the shop this game.

name: Starter Bundle Starting
rawEffect: Gain a random common item, a random common relic, and 5 Shards.

name: Steady Growth
rawEffect: After Stall (15), enemies have 40% increased stats.

name: Steady Growth
rawEffect: After Stall (15), enemies have 55% increased stats.

name: Stunned
rawEffect: At start of combat, Heroes are Stunned for 6 seconds.

name: Survivor Charm Starting
rawEffect: Gain 1 extra Shard per surviving Hero at end of combat. Start with 5 fewer Shards.

name: Swift Codex
rawEffect: Heroes gain 5 Attack Speed. On combat victory, permanently increase the Attack Speed gained by 5.

name: Tank Crest Starting
rawEffect: Get an item which makes a Hero count as a Tank during combat.

name: Tank Equipment Starting
rawEffect: Get an item which benefits Tanks. Start with 5 fewer Shards.

name: Tank's Absolution Engine
rawEffect: Heroes gain 60 Defense. Every 8 times a Tank is auto attacked, Stun that attacking enemy for 1.5 seconds.

name: Tank's Emblem
rawEffect: Each second if there is a Tank in combat, Heroes gain 1 Defense.

name: Tank's Enchanted Reflection
rawEffect: Tanks gain 30 Defense and 25 Magic.

name: Tank's Frostplate Banner
rawEffect: Whenever a Tank is auto attacked, they apply 2 Frost to the attacker.

name: Tank's Intercession Prism
rawEffect: Tanks gain 50 Defense per enemy targeting them. Every 10 Seconds, the Tank with the highest current HP Taunts all enemies.

name: Tank's Invigoration Filigree
rawEffect: After Stall (20), Tanks gain 1 HP/S per 8 Defense they have.

name: Tank's Medallion
rawEffect: Tanks gain 30 Defense.

name: Tank's Memento
rawEffect: At start of combat, inflict 20 Poison on all enemies per Tank in combat.

name: Tank's Patience Banner
rawEffect: After Stall (15), Tanks permanently gain 5 Defense.

name: Tank's Poisonplate Banner
rawEffect: Whenever a Tank is auto attacked, they apply 1 Poison to the attacker.

name: Tank's Readiness Banner
rawEffect: Tank's Stall abilities trigger 6 seconds faster.

name: Tank's Resilience Banner
rawEffect: Whenever a Tank is auto attacked, they gain 2 Defense.

name: Tank's Vital Reflection
rawEffect: Tanks gain 30 Defense and 200 Max HP.

name: Temporal Alignment Crystal
rawEffect: On Stall trigger, deal 8 damage to all enemies for each Rush you've triggered this game. On Rush trigger, give 8 lasting Shields to all Heroes for each Stall you've triggered this game.

name: Temporal Mandate
rawEffect: Quest: Trigger Rush or Stall 40 times. Reward: Increase your team size by 1 (Max: 5).

name: The Riftbreaker
rawEffect: After Stall (90), break the rift.

name: Thermal Inverter
rawEffect: Whenever a Hero inflicts Burn, also inflict 50% of the Burn applied as Frost. Whenever a Hero inflicts Frost, also inflict 50% of the Frost applied as Burn.

name: Trigger Bounty Activator
rawEffect: Every other Stall trigger, gain 1 Shard. Every other Rush trigger, gain 1 Shard.

name: Trigger Safeguard Activator
rawEffect: On Stall or Rush trigger, give Heroes a lasting 10% Max HP Shield and 2 Mana Regen.

name: Trigger Synchrony Activator
rawEffect: Every 3 Stall triggers, Stun all enemies for 2 seconds. Every 3 Rush triggers, Stun all enemies for 2 seconds.

name: Unity Mandate
rawEffect: Quest: Win a combat with 4 or more heroes of the same class in combat or in the reserves. Reward: Increase your team size by 1 (Max: 5).
quest: Win a combat with 4 or more heroes of the same class in combat or in the reserves.

name: Unity Vessel
rawEffect: Quest: Win a combat with 3 or more Heroes of the same Class in play. Reward: Gain 30 Shards.
quest: Win a combat with 3 or more Heroes of the same Class in play.

name: Vampiric Codex
rawEffect: Heroes gain 2 Omnivamp. On combat victory, permanently increase the Omnivamp gained by 2.

name: Vampirism Starting
rawEffect: Heroes gain 10 Omnivamp.

name: Vanguard Crest Starting

name: Vanguard Equipment Starting
rawEffect: Get an item which benefits Vanguards. Start with 5 fewer Shards.

name: Vanguard's Aegis Banner
rawEffect: At start of combat, Vanguards gain Shields equal to 25% of their Max HP.

name: Vanguard's Amplification Filigree
rawEffect: For Rush (8), Vanguards gain +100% Max HP.

name: Vanguard's Combative Reflection
rawEffect: Vanguards gain 200 Max HP and 25 Attack.

name: Vanguard's Emblem
rawEffect: Every 5 seconds if there is a Vanguard in combat, Heroes gain 150 Shields.

name: Vanguard's Endurance Banner
rawEffect: Vanguard's Rush abilities last 3 seconds longer.

name: Vanguard's Flamefists Banner
rawEffect: Whenever a Vanguard auto attacks, they inflict 3 Burn on their target.

name: Vanguard's Flameplate Banner
rawEffect: Whenever a Vanguard is auto attacked, they inflict 3 Burn on the attacker.

name: Vanguard's Frenzy Prism
rawEffect: Whenever a Vanguard goes below 50% Max HP for the first time each combat they gain +33% Attack Speed, +33% Attack, and +33% Defense.

name: Vanguard's Medallion
rawEffect: Vanguards gain 200 Max HP.

name: Vanguard's Memento
rawEffect: At start of combat, inflict 45 Burn on all enemies per Vanguard in combat.

name: Vanguard's Plated Reflection
rawEffect: Vanguards gain 200 Max HP and 30 Defense.

name: Vanguard's Rally Banner
rawEffect: For Rush (10), Vanguards gain 1 Attack and 1 Defense per 25 Max HP.

name: Vanguard's Titanic Engine
rawEffect: Heroes gain 400 Max HP. Whenever a Vanguard auto attacks or is auto attacked, they gain 10 Max HP. Every 200 Max HP gained this way, give them 25 Attack and increase their size.

name: Venom Amplification Engine
rawEffect: Whenever an enemy takes 50 or more damage from Poison, they also take damage equal to 4% of their Max HP.

name: Venom Precision Prism
rawEffect: Whenever an enemy takes Poison damage, Heroes gain 2 Crit.

name: Victory Mandate
rawEffect: Quest: Win 4 combats. Reward: Increase your team size by 1 (Max: 5).

name: Victory Vessel
rawEffect: Quest: Win 3 combats. Reward: Gain 25 Shards.

name: Violence Conduit
rawEffect: Quest: Auto attack 200 times. Reward: Each Hero's first auto attack against each enemy gains 750 Crit.
reward: Each Hero's first auto attack against each enemy gains 750 Crit.

name: Vital Codex
rawEffect: Heroes gain 50 Max HP. On combat victory, permanently increase the Max HP gained by 50.

name: Warrior Crest Starting
rawEffect: Get an item which makes a Hero count as a Warrior during combat.

name: Warrior Equipment Starting
rawEffect: Get an item which benefits Warriors. Start with 5 fewer Shards.

name: Warrior's Aegis Banner
rawEffect: At start of combat, Warriors gain a lasting Shield equal to 500% of their Attack.

name: Warrior's Bloodshield Engine
rawEffect: Heroes gain 50 Attack. Whenever a Warrior deals damage, they gain lasting Shields equal to 15% of the damage dealt.

name: Warrior's Bravery Banner
rawEffect: Whenever a Warrior Crits, they deal bonus damage equal to 100% of their Attack.

name: Warrior's Emblem
rawEffect: If there is a Warrior in combat, your Hero's auto attacks gain 50 Crit.

name: Warrior's Endurance Banner
rawEffect: Warrior's Rush abilities last 3 seconds longer.

name: Warrior's Exaltation Prism
rawEffect: Whenever a Warrior kills, they gain +50% Attack, heal 100% of their Max HP and gain 100 Mana.

name: Warrior's Medallion
rawEffect: Warriors gain 25 Attack.

name: Warrior's Memento
rawEffect: For each Warrior in combat, Rush abilities last 2 seconds longer.

name: Warrior's Mending Banner

name: Warrior's Precise Reflection
rawEffect: Warriors gain 25 Attack and 15 Crit.

name: Warrior's Rally Banner
rawEffect: Rush (10): Warriors gain +50% Attack.

name: Warrior's Sundering Filigree
rawEffect: For Rush (8), whenever a Warrior Crits an enemy reduce the enemy's Defense by 20.

name: Warrior's Swift Reflection

name: Weakness
